headline: DTE Energy Board of Directors declares quarterly dividend
summary: Company continues more than 100-year history of issuing cash dividend DETROIT, May 7, 2026 /PRNewswire/ --  — The DTE Energy Board of Directors declared a $1.165 per share dividend on its common...
